title: Coleus leiperi
taxonomy: Coleus leiperi is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. Coleus leiperi is a member of the genus Coleus, which consists of over 600 species of flowering plants. The genus Coleus is also known as Solenostemon, and it is part of the larger family Lamiaceae, which includes mint, basil, and other popular herbs. Coleus leiperi is also known for its attractive foliage, which is often used in ornamental gardening.
